prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app product detail page stat icon — vocabulary count
Primary request: A single flat minimalist app icon of a vertical book/tablet card matching the 词句刷刷刷 textbook cover logo. Thick rounded blue frame (#4B9FE8), white interior, solid blue header bar at top, three short pale-blue horizontal text lines in the middle, and a bright green circle accent (#3DD968) at the bottom center with a tiny darker green dot. Clean educational dictionary metaphor for "collected words".
Style/medium: flat vector UI icon, no 3D, no gradients, no shadows, no gloss, no claymorphism, no skeuomorphism
Composition/framing: one icon centered, front-facing, generous padding, crisp rounded corners, square canvas
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting
Color palette: sky blue #4B9FE8, pale blue #B8D9F0, white, leaf green #3DD968 only
Constraints: no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no extra decorations
Avoid: black icons, 3D plastic, jelly glass, realistic book photo, drop shadow, dark gray palette
Background: perfectly flat solid magenta #ff00ff chroma-key only. Uniform with no gradients or texture. Do not use magenta in the icon.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app product detail page stat icon — practical sentences
Primary request: A single flat minimalist app icon of a rounded speech bubble for "practical sentences". Thick blue rounded bubble (#4B9FE8) with white interior, two simple blue quotation marks, three pale-blue horizontal text lines, small blue tail at bottom-left, and a bright green circle accent (#3DD968) at bottom-right. Must visually match the flat textbook-cover logo family.
Style/medium: flat vector UI icon, no 3D, no gradients, no shadows, no gloss, no claymorphism
Composition/framing: one icon centered, front-facing, generous padding, square canvas
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting
Color palette: sky blue #4B9FE8, pale blue #B8D9F0, white, leaf green #3DD968 only
Constraints: no readable text, no watermark
Avoid: black glossy speech bubble, 3D plastic, jelly glass, quotation marks that look metallic, drop shadow
Background: perfectly flat solid magenta #ff00ff chroma-key only. Uniform with no gradients or texture. Do not use magenta in the icon.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile app product detail page stat icon — learning units
Primary request: A single flat minimalist app icon of a circular refresh/cycle symbol for "learning units". Soft pale-blue circular background, two thick rounded arrow arcs forming a loop (one sky blue #4B9FE8, one pale blue #B8D9F0), with a small rounded blue square at center containing a bright green dot (#3DD968). Clean progress/cycle metaphor matching the flat textbook-cover logo family.
Style/medium: flat vector UI icon, no 3D, no gradients, no shadows, no gloss, no claymorphism
Composition/framing: one icon centered, front-facing, generous padding, square canvas
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting
Color palette: sky blue #4B9FE8, pale blue #B8D9F0 and #E8F4FD, white, leaf green #3DD968 only
Constraints: no text, no numbers, no watermark
Avoid: black 3D recycle arrows, glossy plastic, clock realism, drop shadow, dark gray palette
Background: perfectly flat solid magenta #ff00ff chroma-key only. Uniform with no gradients or texture. Do not use magenta in the icon.
